name: Research Drop Agent
description: Unlocks paid research drops, source trails, watch notes, and reports inside Telegram or Discord after receipt verification.
degenPitch: Drop the report behind a receipt, not behind trust-me-bro screenshots.
whatItDoes: Publishes a free preview for a research drop.
Verifies receipt before sending the full report or source trail.
feeBehavior: Research unlock price, builder fee, and DNA 0.1% fee are visible before payment.
cursorPrompt: Build a Research Drop Agent using DNA x402. Show a free preview, quote the full report, verify receipt, unlock the full report, and include the receipt ID in the delivery log.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Research Drop Agent using DNA x402. Show a free preview, quote the full report, verify receipt, unlock the full report, and include the receipt ID in the delivery log.
exampleFlow: Bot returns quote for full drop
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt ID is logged with delivery timestamp.
